directive: Add hotkeys for /ui presets, reduce slim editor chrome, and make the normal slim conversation widget render with lighter card/chrome affordances while preserving /focus as the stricter plaintext mode.

children.label: hotkeys
children.description: Add TUI hotkeys for UI posture switching, including fast access to /ui full and /ui slim, with tests covering the new keybindings and state transitions.

children.label: editor-chrome
children.description: Reduce slim-mode editor chrome in the TUI while preserving full-mode styling and interaction behavior. Update tests for the slim editor presentation and hints.

children.label: conversation-chrome
children.description: Make the normal slim conversation widget render with lighter card/chrome affordances, while keeping /focus as the stricter plaintext fullscreen mode. Update rendering tests/snapshots as needed.
Add TUI hotkeys for UI posture switching, including fast access to /ui full and /ui slim, with tests covering the new keybindings and state transitions.
children.label: hotkeys

children.description: Reduce slim-mode editor chrome in the TUI while preserving full-mode styling and interaction behavior. Update tests for the slim editor presentation and hints.
children.label: editor-chrome

children.description: Make the normal slim conversation widget render with lighter card/chrome affordances, while keeping /focus as the stricter plaintext fullscreen mode. Update rendering tests/snapshots as needed.
children.label: conversation-chrome

plan.rationale: These three UI changes touch overlapping but separable TUI subsystems: input/key handling, editor rendering, and conversation rendering. Splitting them reduces merge risk and keeps each child testable.
